profiles.name: Evangelist Melanie Nunn
profiles.bio: Before moving to Paducah, she and her family lived in Detroit, MI for twenty-five years where she taught English and Journalism at Henry Ford High School.

profiles.name: Elder Jimmy Jones
profiles.bio: Elder Jones was born in Cairo IL, graduate of Sumner High School, West KY Vocational-Technical School and attended Coyne Electronic Institute for 15 months. He was an employee of USEC for 37 years in instrument maintenance.

profiles.name: Rev. Fairly Taylor
profiles.bio: Reverend Fairley Taylor Jr, is the son of Brenda Taylor and the late Fairley Taylor Sr.

profiles.name: Minister Joyce Shields
profiles.bio: Joyce Marie Harden-Shields is second oldest of five children born to the parents Leon (deceased) and Joyce Harden.

profiles.name: Minister Doralyn Warren
profiles.bio: Currently employed at West Kentucky Community and Technical College as an Instructor of teaching in the Nursing Assistant Program. Her previous employment was working in Longterm Care for over 40 years. Her passion for taking care of the elderly community she says “is a calling”. Now she is teaching nursing assistants to give the best care and service to the elders. She has a strong passion for teaching which she sees is a gift from God. The purpose of her call into the ministry is to teach God’s love to all people without a respect of persons.

profiles.name: Rev. Dennis Gray
profiles.bio: Pastor Dennis Gray, a native of Hickman, Kentucky, is a commissioned minister of the Christian Church (Disciple of Christ). Pastor Gray was called by God to the ministry in January 1997; he answered the call and made the petition to God that if He would fill him with the Holy Spirit, he would go wherever he was sent.

profiles.name: Marsha Roundtree
profiles.title: Church Administrative Assistant
profiles.bio: Keeps complete records of the transactions of all business meetings; keep records of the church membership, record of baptism, list of deaths, suspended, prepare bulletins/programs and prepares all correspondence, sends out personal statements to members of their yearly gifts and serves as finance secretary in assisting the finance chairman.

profiles.name: Weldon Stokes
profiles.title: Finance Chairman
profiles.bio: The Finance Chairman is responsible for the financial records of the church.

profiles.name: John Burnett
profiles.title: Finance Vice Chair
profiles.bio: The Finance Vice Chairman is responsible for the financial records of the church when the chief is not available and to assist the finance chairman when needed.

profiles.name: John Burnett
profiles.title: Chairman of Deacons
profiles.bio: Deacon Burnett has been a deacon for over 20 years, serves as vice-president of the Ushers Ministry, Finance Vice-Chairman; and is a member of Culinary Ministry and a member of the Official Team.

profiles.name: Thomas L. Biles
profiles.bio: Deacon for over 40 years, member of the Male Chorus, Discipleship Training teacher and a member of the Official Team.

profiles.name: Mario Johnson
profiles.bio: Deacon for more than 15 years and member of the Official Team.

profiles.name: William S. Jones
profiles.bio: Deacon for over 30 years, Vice-chairman Trustee Board, member of the Usher Ministry, Male Chorus, Official Team and Discipleship Training teacher.

profiles.name: Weldon Stokes
profiles.bio: Deacon for over 30 years, Finance Chief, member of the Usher Ministry, Culinary Ministry and Official Team Secretary.

profiles.name: David Jones, Sr.
profiles.bio: Ordained as a deacon on June 21, 2013. Member of the Male Chorus, and Official Team.

profiles.name: Angela Johnson
profiles.title: President
profiles.bio: President of the Deaconess. Member of the Usher Ministry, and Women’s Ministry.

profiles.name: Carrie Jones
profiles.title: Deaconess Vice President
profiles.bio: Member of Mt. Moriah since her childhood, member of the Deaconess Board for more than 5 years, member of the Official Team. Former member of the Music Ministry and Missionary Ministry.

profiles.name: Mattie Bryant
profiles.bio: Longtime member of Mt. Moriah. Former member of the Missionary Ministry and the Music Ministry.

profiles.name: L. Joyce Biles
profiles.bio: Former member of the Missionary Ministry, Women’s Ministry, bulletin board ministry, and represented Mt. Moriah at Community Kitchen.

profiles.name: Ruthie Washington
profiles.bio: Former Missionary Ministry Treasurer, Women’s Ministry member, and secretary for the Usher Ministry.

profiles.name: Mildred Arnold
profiles.bio: Oldest member of the Usher Ministry, former member of the Missionary Ministry and retired head of the Culinary Ministry.

profiles.name: Sherona Waldon
profiles.bio: Member of Mt. Moriah for 61 years, President of Women’s Ministry. Former Administrative Assistant to Pastor Calvin Cole, Sr. and former Choir member.

profiles.name: Carrie Jones
profiles.bio: Member of Mt. Moriah since her childhood, member of the Deaconess Board for more than 5 years, member of the Official Team. Former member of the Music Ministry and Missionary Ministry.

profiles.name: Derek Strong
profiles.bio: Member for over 10 years, member of Official Team, lawn keeper, Audio/Video Ministry.

profiles.name: Richard Washington
profiles.bio: President Usher Ministry; member of the Official Team; driver for the Transportation Ministry.

profiles.name: Brenda Stokes
profiles.bio: Member over 40 years, member of Usher Ministry, Women’s Ministry, Culinary Ministry Head and member of Official Team.

profiles.name: Tonya Gill
profiles.bio: Head of the Youth Department.

profiles.name: Elbert Speers
profiles.bio: Audio/Video Tech, photographer, member of Official Board.

profiles.name: Marsha Roundtree
profiles.bio: Church Administrative Assistant, member of Women’s Ministry and Official Board.

profiles.name: Bessie Newbern
profiles.bio: Member over 20 years, member of Official Team, former head of Decorations Ministry.

ministries.introText: Learn more about the ministries and leaders who serve the Mt. Moriah Missionary Baptist Church family.
